title: Jinwu Wei: Feng Qi Jingling
synonyms: Jinwu Guard: The Wind Rises in Jinling
synopsis: Thunder and fire kill people, rumors spread, and rat-faced sinister soldiers rampage across the imperial capital. Everything seems to point to the secrets of the former dynasty that were wiped out by thunder and fire. A pair of hands brought three very different young men together. Jing Yifei, the cold and proud female master of Jinwu Guard, was ordered to find out the truth about the rat soldiers. Bai Qi, the descendant of Jieyi who lives in seclusion in the mountains, led his master to go down the mountain to find a young machine master to join the Jinwu Guard. But the person he was looking for, Qin Ming, was deceiving and abducting him!? As the three of them continued to work together, they gradually came closer to the truth about Lei Huo. (Source: iq.com)

title: Wo Wei Dao Zong
synopsis: In a conspiracy, the supreme leader of the martial arts world, Dao Zong, was killed, and the leaders of various gangs were either dead or imprisoned, and the martial arts world was in chaos. In order to rebuild the order of the martial arts world, Yan Jiyu, the leader of Changfeng Pavilion, sent messengers to various sects, intending to establish a new "righteous" martial arts world headed by him. However, at this time, the fledgling Yang Ren was entrusted to deliver a letter left by Dao Zong. Along the way, he was surrounded by powerful enemies and extremely dangerous, but he relied on his passion and chivalry to constantly break through himself and defeat his opponents. While his martial arts skills were advancing rapidly, he also met a group of chivalrous and righteous people. What should the martial arts world be like? Yang Ren couldn't answer, but he knew it was definitely not what Yan Jiyu said. Yang Ren raised a big banner: "Chengfeng Gang", and quickly gathered people from the

title: MIRU: Paths to My Future
titleNative: 未ル わたしのみらい
synonyms: 未ル(Miru): Paths To My Future
synopsis: "未ル(Miru): Paths To My Future", an anthology anime series by five animation studios. A Story of Encounters between Humanity and a Robot. Born in a distant future, MIRU, a weaponless robot, travels across time to support people from different eras. MIRU meets individuals from different times and places, people who, despite their struggles, live their lives with determination. Through their encounters with MIRU, people take small yet meaningful steps forward. These steps, like the "Butterfly Effect," create waves of change, moving toward a brighter future. "The future is in our hands." A story that reminds us of the power in every small beginning. (Source: It's Anime powered by REMOW) Contains: 1) Episode 079:「スターダストメモリー」 "Stardust Memory" 2) Episode 101: 「The King of the Forest」 3) Episode 217: 「この世の波風さわぎ」"Londonderry Air" 4) Episode 630: 「Re: MIRU」 5) Episode 926: 「待ってて、今行く」 "Wait, I'll Be There"

title: HANA-Doll*: Reinterpretation of Flowering
synopsis: Anime adaptation of Hana-Doll*, a 2.5D idol franchise. In the story of the idol project, the "Hana Ningyou Project" (Flower Doll Project) exists to artificially create the "perfect idol" by implanting a special flower seed inside a body. The franchise follows the growth of young men who dedicate their lives to the project. The anime will adapt the "first season" of the drama CD series, titled "Flowering". (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Jian Gu
synopsis: Ning Yi, a young grassroots boy in Xiling, has a special gluttonous physique, and he is dependent on Pei Fan, who has a blood feud. Later, he becomes bound to the mysterious girl Xu Qingyan because of the exotic treasure bone flute. He also helped him achieve the status of a sword wielder and shoulder the responsibility of saving the world's common people and light. (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: Long Shidai
synopsis: Xin Yun is a loser in all the lives he was reborn into, always carefree instead of working hard. Recently reborn, he finds himself in the past and with the chance to change the course of the future. Follow Xin Yun's epic journey of self-cultivation to become the true hero of his story. (Source: INKR)

title: Xi You Ji: 72 Bian
synopsis: In order to save Mount Huaguo, which has no rain all year round, Sun Wukong goes alone to the Three Stars Cave to learn the infinite changes of immortal arts from Bodhi the Elder. Meanwhile, the Dragon King of the East Sea is secretly developing a drug to take revenge on the Heavenly Court. This drug will allow him to control the consciousness of its victim and turns them into a ruthless killer. After Sun Wukong and his classmates discover the Dragon King’s plot, they decide to work together to try and stop him. (Source: Far East Films)

title: Me & Roboco: The Movie
titleNative: 劇場版 僕とロボコ
synopsis: Ten-year-old Taira Bondo is a normal grade school student who spends his days like he’s living a comedy, alongside his OrderMaid, Roboco. One day, Roboco gets a sudden knee notification as worlds collide! Someone has disrupted space-time, and now, various Robocos from the multiverse begin to gather… (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Yishi Du Zun
synopsis: As a lawyer back on earth, Lin Yun had never lost a case. He owed his success to three things: two blessings he received at birth (a photographic memory and the ability to comprehend anything he studies) and an indomitable will he forged himself. While on a trip in Shandong province, he decided he would pay a visit to Mt. Tai. Just as he was cresting the peak, he felt a sharp pain in his chest and his vision went black. Upon waking up, he found himself in the world of Profound Amber occupying the body of a sword slave who had shared his name. The last thing he remembered before dying was the image of a sword piercing his chest. Through the memories his body retained the sword slave’s life, Lin Yun came to understand the brutality of this world. If he sought respect, he would have to earn it through strength. The weak found no compassion here. Refusing to leave his fate in the hands of others, Lin Yun set out to become a sovereign. No man or beast would stop him from achieving his desti

title: Harmony of Mille-Feuille
titleNative: うたごえはミルフィーユ
synopsis: First-year high school student, Uta Komaki. She has many weaknesses. But she loves to sing. Aiming for an ordinary youth, she tries to join the light music club as part of her high school debut—only to fail miserably due to her timid nature. In her despair, Uta encounters a form of music created solely by the human voice—a cappella. There, she finds a group of girls whose imperfect youth is woven together only through their harmonized voices. —Even without shining, it's still youth. (Source: Pony Canyon)

title: Snack Basue
synopsis: Welcome to Snack Basue! Delight yourself in this charming snack bar, just five stations away from Hokkaido's largest downtown area, Susukino. Run by the quirky proprietress, Basue, and her junior hostess, Akemi, the place is filled with laughter and smiles from its oddball regulars and walk-ins as they regale tales of their lives. So, pull up a seat and have a drink—is shochu OK? (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Beyblade Burst QuadStrike
titleNative: ベイブレードバースト クアッドストライク
synonyms: ベイブレードバースト BU
synopsis: The stage is set for a masquerade tournament, but the Dark Prince isn’t the only belle at this ball! Enter: the masked Blader known as ‘Quadra’. Wielding her elemental Bey, Lightning Pandora, Quadra has defeated every foe to come her way. Meanwhile, Quadra’s brother, Pax, is busy studying the elemental powers radiating from a series of mysterious ruins nearby. Bel might be the Dark Prince, but this adventure is full of even darker secrets! (Source: BEYBLADE BURST Official on YouTube)

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.
